creator: o.davydenko@gmail.com
text:
Written by Edwin Groothuis at 2008 December 14 14:50:16 (+0000)
> Please note that PR ports/129636 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/129636

This update will break devel/urjtag, because devel/urjtag require
only ftdi.10 .

It would be preferable remove libftdi major version number from
devel/urjtag dependencies before this update.

-- 
WBR,
	Davydenko Olexandr
